suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-05-27. CVE-2025-21199 applies to Microsoft Azure Agent Installer products under the CPE family cpe:2.3:a:microsoft:azure_agent:* and the NVD affected-software entries are for the "backup" and "site_recovery" products. This repo contains the Java libraries com.microsoft.azure:applicationinsights-core and com.microsoft.azure:applicationinsights-web, which are being mapped to the generic azure_agent CPE by Dependency-Check. Keep this suppression only for that false-positive CPE match.

Reviewed 2026-07-23. CVE-2026-44891, CVE-2026-55831, and CVE-2026-55833 apply to Netty versions before 4.1.136.Final and 4.2.16.Final. This repo now imports io.netty:netty-bom 4.2.16.Final in build.gradle, which is the fixed 4.2.x release according to the CVE descriptions and Netty release notes. Dependency-Check is still reporting these CVEs because the current NVD CPE configuration includes 4.2.16. Keep this suppression only for the already-fixed Netty 4.2.16.Final artifacts until NVD/Dependency-Check metadata catches up or a newer fixed 4.2.x release is available.
